–(The inhabitants of Sodom, many of whom openly practiced homosexuality)
–Wickedness ofGe 19:4-14
–Destroyed by fire as a judgementGe 19:24,25
–To be judged according to opportunityMt 11:24;Lu

–A proverbial term of reproach applied to those who practiced

–The word “harlot” (“shrine prostitute” (N. I. V.)) appears inGe 38:21,22
–And is applied to malesDe 23:17
–And is the translation of a Hebrew feminine form of the word 
translated elsewhere “sodomite”Ho 4:14
